parameters.content:
## 🏛️ FinCEN Real Estate Reporter

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for closing documents
2. Extracts buyer, seller, property, transaction data
3. Identifies beneficial owners for entity buyers
4. Checks if transaction meets reporting thresholds
5. Logs reportable transactions to Google Sheets
6. Sends Slack alert with FinCEN report data

### Setup steps
1. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
2. Create a Google Drive folder for closings
3. Create a Google Sheet with these columns:
   File # | Property | Transaction Type | Amount | Buyer Type | Buyer Name | Beneficial Owner | Seller | Reportable | Report Status | Processed Date
4. Update the folder ID and sheet ID in the nodes
5. Connect your Slack workspace

### Perfect for
- Title companies
- Real estate attorneys
- Closing agents

parameters.prompt: Extract real estate transaction data from this document (closing disclosure, HUD-1, settlement statement, or deed). transactionType (purchase/refinance/transfer), propertyAddress (full street address), propertyCity, propertyState, propertyZip, propertyType (residential/commercial/mixed-use), propertyCounty, purchasePrice (number), closingDate (YYYY-MM-DD), buyerName (full name of buyer/borrower), buyerEntityType (individual/LLC/corporation/trust), buyerStateOfFormation, buyerTaxId, sellerName (full name of seller), sellerEntityType (individual/LLC/corporation/trust), paymentMethod (all-cash/financed/mixed), financingPercent (number 0-100), allCashPurchase (true if no mortgage/loan involved, false if financed), purchasePriceThreshold (true if purchase price >= 300000), beneficialOwnerName, beneficialOwnerPercent (number), beneficialOwnerDob, representativePayerName, representativePayerRole, titleCompany, closingAttorney, reportingThresholdMet (true if all-cash purchase >= 300000), reportingThresholdAmount (number), suspiciousActivityFlag (true/false), suspiciousActivityDetails, fincenReportRequired (true if all-cash purchase by entity >= threshold), reportingDeadline (YYYY-MM-DD), gtoJurisdiction (true/false), gtoCity, riskScore (number 0-100), riskFactorsList (semicolon-separated risk factors).

parameters.jsCode:
const data = ($input.first().json?.data || $input.first().json) || {};
const fileName = $('New Transaction').item.json.name;
const fileId   = $('New Transaction').item.json.id;

const c = v => parseFloat(String(v||0).replace(/[^0-9.]/g,'')) || 0;
const price = c(data.purchasePrice);
const riskFactors = (data.riskFactorsList || '').split(';').filter(Boolean);

const fincenRequired = data.fincenReportRequired || data.allCashPurchase && price >= 300000;
const riskScore = parseInt(data.riskScore) || 0;
const riskLevel = data.suspiciousActivityFlag ? 'Critical' :
  riskScore >= 70 ? 'High' : riskScore >= 40 ? 'Medium' : 'Low';

return [{ json: {
  transactionType:   data.transactionType   || 'N/A',
  propertyAddress: [data.propertyStreet || data.propertyAddress, data.propertyCity, data.propertyState, data.propertyZip].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || 'N/A',
  propertyCity:      data.propertyCity      || 'N/A',
  propertyState:     data.propertyState     || 'N/A',
  propertyType:      data.propertyType      || 'N/A',
  purchasePrice:     price,
  closingDate:       data.closingDate       || 'N/A',
  buyerName:         data.buyerLegalName || data.buyerName || 'N/A',
  buyerEntityType:   data.buyerType || data.buyerEntityType || 'N/A',
  sellerName:        data.sellerLegalName || data.sellerName || 'N/A',
  paymentMethod:     data.paymentMethod     || 'N/A',
  allCashPurchase:   data.allCashPurchase   || false,
  beneficialOwnerName: data.beneficialOwnerName || 'N/A',
  fincenRequired,
  reportingDeadline: data.reportingDeadline || 'N/A',
  gtoJurisdiction:   data.gtoJurisdiction   || false,
  gtoCity:           data.gtoCity           || 'N/A',
  suspiciousActivityFlag: data.suspiciousActivityFlag || false,
  suspiciousActivityDetails: data.suspiciousActivityDetails || 'None',
  riskScore, riskLevel,
  riskFactorsList: data.riskFactorsList || 'None',
  riskFactorsCount: riskFactors.length,
  fileName, fileId,
  processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  buyerAddress:    data.buyerAddress || 'N/A',
  propertyCounty:  data.propertyCounty  || 'N/A',
  fileNumber:      'N/A',
  dataGaps:        'N/A',
  fileId: fileId,
  fileNumber: "N/A",
  buyerType: data.buyerEntityType || "N/A",
  buyerTIN: data.buyerTaxId || "N/A",
  buyerAddress: "N/A",
  isEntityBuyer: data.buyerEntityType && data.buyerEntityType !== "individual" ? true : false,
  sellerType: data.sellerEntityType || "N/A",
  financingType: data.paymentMethod || "N/A",
  primaryBOName: data.beneficialOwnerName || "N/A",
  beneficialOwnerCount: data.beneficialOwnerName ? 1 : 0,
  beneficialOwnerSummary: data.beneficialOwnerName ? data.beneficialOwnerName + " (" + (data.beneficialOwnerPercent||0) + "%)" : "N/A",
  propertyCounty: "N/A",
  isReportable: fincenRequired,
  reportReason: data.allCashPurchase ? "All-cash purchase" : data.suspiciousActivityFlag ? "Suspicious activity" : "N/A",
  reportStatus: fincenRequired ? "REQUIRED" : "Not Required",
  dataGaps: "N/A",
}}];
